status: newly frozen post-hoc analysis of the inspected natural question-end cohort; no cross-mechanism outcome statistic computed before freeze
scientific_question: Do option-free Gemma states align physical outcomes across mechanisms even when matching outcomes require opposite numerical directions?
primary_endpoints: mean pairwise AUC across all 1080 cross-mechanism rankings
mean pairwise AUC across the 648 opposite-response-orientation rankings
secondary_endpoints: nine surface-variant combinations per mechanism pair

null.construction: choose three of six mechanisms as direct response; derive every prompt outcome from numeric direction XOR mechanism orientation

success_rule.strong: overall and counter-numeric Jacobian AUC > 0.5 with exact p <= 0.05, and at least 6/9 opposite-orientation mechanism-pair AUCs > 0.5
success_rule.partial: counter-numeric passes but overall fails, or breadth fails
success_rule.jacobian_specific: paired mechanism-pair-bootstrap 95% interval for Jacobian minus direct excludes zero positively

guardrails: post-hoc analysis of previously inspected cohort
all prompts, pairs, variants, layers, fits, and negative results retained
positive observational geometry is not causal use or literal chain of thought
